scripts.site: npm run sync && npm run build
scripts.preview: BASE_PATH=/ npm run build && npx --yes serve public
scripts.test: node --test scripts/lib/html.test.mjs scripts/lib/page-context.test.mjs scripts/lib/site-config.test.mjs scripts/lib/sitemap.test.mjs scripts/lib/parse-reading.test.mjs scripts/lib/parse-studies.test.mjs scripts/build.test.mjs
